h8dd957c0gcc6ag48b8g9464g22614fcf82b0: I trust you celebrated most heartily? Curious; I wonder if your tadpole shares in your suffering the morning after...
h4a7bf575gcff5g409eg984eg00e915e36ae8: I feel fine - I've faced worse foes of late than a few drinks.
h2472c859g9b51g4623gae81g443ad02bbe9d: I'm glad to hear it. You'll need fortitude for what's to come.
h6a5b26a2g4bfag4e38gbba0g8cc587cc86de: Moonrise Towers beckons. I've told you all I know, and now I'll join your camp to help you face whatever's to come.
he43f360bgd9a2g48adg8374g3132dd5d886b: With luck, and the Oak Father's blessings, we might actually survive. Are you ready?
he5cdd7f1ga618g4105ga5b8gda135f3f7152: Onward then. We'll speak soon, I'm sure.
h5568f0bbg7b01g49f7ga6f6ge4a3cebd695c: Remind me - what exactly lies ahead?
hbe3270b6g24d2g4bdeg8cb2g9789114842c4: There is a terrible curse surrounding Moonrise Towers - a shadow curse that drains away all light and life.
h22e0bed0g57bcg4bd3g905dg7974715c735c: Few can resist it without dying, or transforming into shadow beings. You can try to journey overland if you wish, but I strongly advise you you go under.
h159cafe6g0cb6g4b39g9010g40a9e7384476: There is a tunnel leading from the temple of Selûne right down into the Underdark and beyond. The entrance is hidden somewhere in the ruins.
hc7336d9agccdcg4cb8g9e57gdcfe5f1774c6: I believe if you find this entrance, you'll discover a route that leads to Moonrise Towers, bypassing the worst of the shadow curse.
h8ef4b87eg7251g4c92gb054g7d65ccfe1571: Aradin and his lot were looking for the same entrance - they sought an artefact called the Nightsong that was supposed to be housed somewhere down there.
h55375a9cgac0cg496agada0g78bf2c9f04eb: All right. We'd better get moving.
h66573dd9g1472g4a24gbba4g584d55546f86: I promised to help you with your infection. There's almost certainly a cure to be found at Moonrise Towers, but it's... complicated.
hea4e9db9g59e2g4689g85c5g370cba2476b9: The journey, specifically - it's extremely perilous. Though it seems you're well accustomed to navigating danger.
h65fd4077g3eb1g4af1gbefcg13c5f98f9084: We get a cure and the chance to hit these assholes where they live? Sounds good.
h6734dd9eg05d4g408dgadb0g5abfd40d0222: To get to the towers, you'll need to pass through a terrible place - a cursed place.
h7dc1d485g1026g4096g86b6g27151bdd1e0f: This curse shrouds everything in shadow - you will not find life, light or anything natural there.
he0d1c643gdeefg44aeg8678gffafb93e9827: Any who linger are twisted by the curse; they become shadow beings - tormented, dangerous souls.
h83898ac3ga457g4341g8239gf24b7141ed00: Sounds like I've no choice - I need to find a way through.
h9b869d81gd8fbg4b18g9926g0b0e59188d1a: You're half-right - you have to get to Moonrise, but you still have a choice of how to get there.
hec43aa92g543dg4677g9feegd2216a45d44a: You could go overland - along the Risen Road or through the mountains. Easier at first, but you'll run into the shadow curse eventually.
h4c48f575gb6abg4572gb409g89a71bbe490e: You could also go under. There is a tunnel somewhere in the ruined temple of Selûne. It leads to Moonrise Towers through the Underdark.
hf522df66ge887g4ebeg814fg003c59bf305a: Long ago, a man called Ketheric Thorm built a secret stronghold deep down there, before rallying a whole army of Dark Justiciars - Shar worshippers.
h9711b65agac4eg4ac6ga880g1147b753895c: Dark Justiciars? I must see for myself.
h8de6a956ge2dfg4169g8cefgce9e4a7db9e9: Aradin and his lot were looking for a way down there - they were promised riches if they retrieved a relic called the Nightsong. But I think there's more.
h9c970507g53cfg453dga04dgf2789cf9314e: From this stronghold, Ketheric's forces could access both the temple of Selûne and Moonrise Towers - but he was defeated before he could launch an attack.
hcc726b75g7890g4b10gab68gc6f50d1c1cf0: If you can find this place, I'll wager it will reveal a path to Moonrise Towers, bypassing the worst of the shadow curse.
h3f981e3ag4f08g4d85g8b02gd315e63c7947: I found the hidden entrance in the Temple of Selûne - the way is clear.
h61c39401g02ddg4d11ga648g10efc1be36fe: Already...? If only I'd gone with you instead of Aradin.
hdd19bab9gf70cg49d5gb6ddg6deac0726625: I've already found a way into the Underdark. I can pick up the trail from there.

hba85ec0ag3892g4afeg81e2g23fbefa461b4: You'll need to pick up where Aradin left off - find the hidden entrance. It's somewhere in the temple of Selûne.
h76509e46g8e4dg4619g84b1g8afde7ed1ee6: One of the adventurers had a clue to help find it - a dwarf called Brian. It might still be found on his corpse, wherever the goblins left it.
h647a7ecdg9f2bg49f6g9b83g7e7c6a4ef75b: I don't want to risk getting lost in the Underdark - I'll journey overland.

hab25921cg1e02g4f2ag8e85g04e5fe9c3f6a: I would like to join your camp, if you'll allow me. I can offer my skills, my counsel.
h859a85e5g7bc7g4ce1g88d9g6867161c2792: I've long sought to return to Moonrise Towers - unfinished business. It seems our fates have aligned.
hf75082bbgecd9g49e2g9482geb9aff3ad1eb: How do I find this passage through the Underdark?

ha5a96d83gb125g473egbb4cg60fd6ddc56cb: I advise you start in the temple of Selûne - if you find the Dark Justiciars' hidden entrance, it could lead you all the way to Moonrise.
h1e9b12c7ga093g4193gbc83ge320aad710e5: You want to come to Moonrise as well? Why?
h51c38307g11c4g4f8bg9d97g986925521bb4: Those illithid creatures threaten the natural order - it's my duty to do what I can to stop them.
hffd043dbgdc09g4254gb179g82f00e5dc90e: There's also the shadow curse - it's an affront and must be cleansed.
hbc040677g1f75g435ag8e35g99b659e2fc09: I helped overthrow Ketheric Thorm and his Dark Justiciars, years ago. But I failed to prevent him from unleashing darkness across the region before he was defeated.
h9e8f02c3g3b87g4cb5ga59bgd9c62299fa80: I spent years researching the curse, trying to put an end to it. Nothing has worked - yet.
h08d7da35gc4cag435dg91ecg22ab57f646ef: If I can join you and get close to Moonrise, perhaps I can lift this curse, same as you may find a cure for your infection.

h938934a6gfc41g46fag8355gd71d62170797: Precisely. Then perhaps I could have done something about both the shadow curse and ceremorphosis aberrations.
h97134bdag30d3g4939g9628g136e5ef3e28c: But in my eagerness, I put far too much faith in the abilities of Aradin and his band. We didn't even get close.
h945d53e3g3897g4ce7g8859gf8d9c904bfbb: One of those who died had a clue that was supposed to help us find the hidden entrance to the Underdark.
h6bbb56fegd344g4f1eg9d20gdaa7514582cb: A dwarf called Brian, I believe. Though there's no guarantee that the goblins left him recognisable.
h7472c94eg3119g4ee4g8c75g55125730bf7c: It's lost to me. Perhaps in time I can open it up to the world again, but for now, I must help you.
h9bde66e0g5fc5g47e2ga3d1gbfaf65de8ae3: I've chosen a successor as First Druid - Francesca of the High Forest. A bird's already been dispatched to summon her.

h80e0faaag528dg4581gb892gd7380c32ca33: She can tend to the grove, help it heal. In time, others will join. Perhaps some day I can return.
hc84e1983g4e6bg4b64g8cfeg2ea5b4354c39: A fellow druid. I can count on her to tend to the grove in my absence. Help it heal.
hc3738915g72e7g4c9bgb30dg9baa5773fcb9: Precisely! Who indeed? You do not know, and neither do any of the others.
h33c21874g5464g4ef1g9dcfgdcf8c9187392: The grove needs to move beyond the mistakes of the past. What it needs is an unknown quantity; an outsider who can enforce the Oak Father's teachings without bias.
h2fe2b0d1g09d0g4b32gb06ag972db9868ecc: This is why I chose Francesca. She will restore simplicity and purity to the grove in my absence.
h076be22cg1a2dg4de9ga22fg203d3596ef84: Contrary to how some think of us, we druids can play politics when necessary.
h9d84b94eg0e3eg4631g97d9gd03dee7f3d27: Now we've quite the journey ahead. Best get started.
hd8b421cdgc58eg43e0ga39agb22e105fdd2a: Resentment will spring up like mushrooms no matter what I do. You cannot please everyone and you'd be a fool to try.
hfcd2592agfadeg42b3gb46ega09a487f39ce: Sounds like the grove will be in good hands then. We should get going.
h2b139c96g83ecg4f6fgbca5gde76d4768e2b: Indeed. We've quite the journey ahead of us.
ha4d3e7c3g10b1g4fc7gaf65gedfa8c9c7b70: There's nobody in the grove you'd chose?
h53bd25a9gf12dg45efg8087g9122ec1495d9: No. At least, not right now.
h698fdb07ga1bfg472bg83a7g1d01b611bc4b: What about one of the others? Rath perhaps?
h17c96c2fgb2ebg46c9g8679ge0330fe4e236: Rath has promise, but he has a ways to go yet. He wasn't able to stop Kagha by himself. The grove needs experience, and a strong hand.
h4d1e03e6g46d1g45c1g86f0g5e521f5aeef3: I need her to stay focused on her training - the grove will need a skilled healer in my absence.
h838f9184g1816g4c8cgbfe7g9a29dd87aae1: I'm glad you approve - I do not truly care if you approve, but I am glad.
hdb4ed5dcgd790g4cbfg891fgc268c5230829: I never thought I'd say this, but it sounds like the Underdark is the safer route.
h9f0c3cd2g185dg4862g9e46g920148ee6194: Anything is preferable to risking the shadow curse.
h15cead15g3faag4cd6g8733g77514a69f9c9: The decision is yours, but I'd favour the Underdark. Even a place like that is the lesser evil compared to the shadow-cursed lands.
h1f35d896g606eg4f3fg969fg3eac0dff0412: This shadow curse - does it affect Shar worshippers?
h825aefdag675eg4b5fg92c7gf31d1c7ca932: I don't know. Ketheric's followers were defeated or vanished before the effects of the curse took hold.
ha7240bdcg324bg4554g9a2ag1f971b8ed36b: Are these Sharrans still to be found?
h5263573bge4b8g425cgbf20g0fd2b48c1836: As bones, perhaps. But their hidden structures might still remain.
ha53b8042g0c48g4dcbgb6e8ga3ce119f385a: I know the Underdark - it's lethal. I'll travel overland.
hb0cb4eb6g83fag4f30g944bg880826ae8ed8: The Underdark's my home. Better to take that route than risk this curse.
hebd3d1b9g5d8cg4136g8f6egc24da387a0e4: The Absolute's forces can tolerate such a place?
h66ae05b5g3c34g49aeg9398g5b5a7e1faa1f: So it seems, though I don't know how. You will have to choose your approach carefully.
h174faffbgeaf3g45f9g9135gbe04a9614fdf: There must be another way to cure myself - my kin have dealt with these parasites before.
hbfc09dd7gb77eg4100gb1a7ge2b604259242: There must be another way to cure myself.
ha0760a36gd4ccg44d5gb386g1c5a1f2d398f: By all means - pursue any leads you may have. But I sense all roads will lead to Moonrise.
h7cb0b440gaf36g47f3ga784ga45cbd7afd72: How are you so sure Moonrise is where I have to go?
h39c8ab50g2c27g48e5gb65agff416c24bb5c: Nature speaks to me. Birds report what they've seen. And I've overheard goblins speaking of it too. Moonrise is at the heart of all this, I'm sure of it.
h4e68013dg2a64g4de5ga996g88deb3ab72fe: Moonrise Towers it is then. I'd better make haste.
hb65fcab1gfcd9g4904g9782gf2751f85ee26: Wait. There's more you need to know.
h130eeb8fg1792g4ffeg93c8gf5f94d487905: I was expecting more from you than a lead towards some distant, dangerous prospect.
h622b71beg660fg46e5gb71dga292dde8b419: I won't be held accountable just because you're naive enough to expect easy answers. Now allow me to continue.
h5ef12efdgfba8g49c6g8a92gec58c527631d: That's it? Just go to this place?
hc798d0e9g95d6g4637ga663gf6b58af4f0f3: What, were you expecting a spell? A potion? Or perhaps you thought I'd conduct a cack-handed operation on you right here.
h59e65dfbgf04eg4b82g99b8gd8fa22f90195: What were you expecting? That I'd mumble a spell or whip out a potion?
hdae1aaafgd084g4d7ag926dgad75dc9642e9: These tadpoles obey one master. If the ghaik have united in a single Creed, my Queen is in danger.
h1e8e4170gd0e2g4d19gb407gc276b07c4443: Once we are cleansed, we infiltrate Moonrise Towers. Should there be ghaik, we snatch their heads, one by one.
h0964f5e1gd80ag496egaf55gd4ae2a0a10d3: This is sobering news indeed, but there's no use crying over spilt milk. If this is our only option, to Moonrise Towers we go.
h2d617b88gb371g4ddag8534g3b5975216c4a: I suppose it was too much to hope we were going to be cured here and now. To Moonrise, then.
h2049c22dg8f9bg4c00g9490gd4701b23dbab: Just when a cure seemed in reach. To Moonrise Towers, then. May the sun and stars guide us.

h24ff76bdgecf2g42b6gab53ge7912142ba44: You presume I indulged at all.
h7b7bc975gf090g4ff6g93eeg17630f66e3d0: My apologies - though in truth, I'm glad. We've a hard journey ahead of us.
hd70ab648g0e67g4f25g8800g483c989768a4: My apologies then - I must have spent too long in the company of drunken goblins. Now, there's a matter we need to discuss, yes?
hef5a7618g9c56g49c1gb8d3g2f7dd09731e4: Speaking of tadpoles - you promised you'd help me.
